summary: George Russell's controversial pole position sets the stage for a Mercedes resurgence at a heat-soaked Red Ring, where Mercedes' pace advantage could threaten Max Verstappen's championship momentum. McLaren's Oscar Piastri lurks as a genuine threat to both frontrunners, with the team's Friday practice pace suggesting a three-way battle for victory. A dominant Mercedes performance in scorching conditions could dramatically reshape the title fight, handing Lewis Hamilton's team its first commanding weekend of the season and cutting into Verstappen's points lead.
